    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <I, O> DurableExecutionOutput
    DurableExecutor.execute(DurableExecutionInput input, com.amazonaws.services.lambda.runtime.Context lambdaContext, TypeToken<I> inputType, BiFunction<I,DurableContext,O> handler, DurableConfig config)
     
    <T> T
    DurableContext.runInChildContext(String name, Class<T> resultType, Function<DurableContext,T> func)
    Runs a function in a child context, blocking until it completes.
    <T> T
    DurableContext.runInChildContext(String name, TypeToken<T> typeToken, Function<DurableContext,T> func)
    Runs a function in a child context using a TypeToken for generic result types, blocking until complete.
    <T> DurableFuture<T>
    DurableContext.runInChildContextAsync(String name, Class<T> resultType, Function<DurableContext,T> func)
    Asynchronously runs a function in a child context, returning a DurableFuture.
    <T> DurableFuture<T>
    DurableContext.runInChildContextAsync(String name, TypeToken<T> typeToken, Function<DurableContext,T> func)
    Asynchronously runs a function in a child context using a TypeToken for generic result types.
    static <I, O> com.amazonaws.services.lambda.runtime.RequestHandler<DurableExecutionInput,DurableExecutionOutput>
    DurableExecutor.wrap(TypeToken<I> inputType, BiFunction<I,DurableContext,O> handler, DurableConfig config)
